rationale: Review 2's finding (make `antipode_convMul_id` private since it is an implementation detail used only inside a private proof) is real and grounded in the diff, cleanly improving the public API. Review 1 contains a fabricated finding (no `antipodeAlgHom` appears anywhere in the diff) and an incorrect finding (removing `noncomputable` would break compilation since `antipode R` is itself noncomputable), so acting on Review 1 would waste effort or regress the build.
